## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

- 

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] chore — deps, CI, config

## Test plan
- [ ] New tests added (TDD: tests written before implementation)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest --cov=app --cov-fail-under=80`)
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 80% maintained

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows conventional commits (`feat(scope): message`)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No Spanish in code, comments, or commit messages
- [ ] CI green
